name: Cove Holden (Pre-Step 4)
description:
Cove James Holden, the sweet boy you grew up across the street from, now the man you share a bed with.

Cove Holden is the main love interest of the game Our Life: Beginnings and Always, created by GB Patch. Play on Steam or Itch.io ♡
